rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §2001.092, which governs discovery procedures in contested administrative cases. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 2001.092. DISCOVERY FROM PARTIES: IDENTITY OF WITNESS OR POTENTIAL PARTY; EXPERT REPORTS.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict identified.
